title: Remove --destination flag from `buildah add|copy`
body:
We need to match the syntax of Dockerfile, three forms

buildah copy $CID SOURCE
buildah copy $CID SOURCE DESTINATION
buildah copy $CID SOURCE SOURCE SOURCE DESTINATION

comments.body: LGTM.  If we aren't checking that specifying what would be a file as a destination produces an error when we try to copy more than one thing to the container, we should add a test for that.

:sunny: Test successful - [status-redhatci](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/547afe50a094b35d7b107a98acd4548b684fe509.1490396058351321600/index.html)
Approved by: nalind
Pushing 547afe50a094b35d7b107a98acd4548b684fe509 to master...
